findings.summary: prestamp escape accepted any 'CROSS-REPO ' prefix, silently dropping origin/date stamping — now requires the complete marker shape (op + date + origin), probed with bare-prefix and near-miss-marker inputs
duplicate/aliased --to targets double-wrote one brain — now deduped on the resolved brain path, later spellings visibly refused (residual: symlink aliases bypass resolve-level dedup, noted not fixed)
scenario exit gate ignored pinDemonstrated after the pin build it gates — now binds both capabilities; the RED-first single-capability phase is preserved in cross-repo-record.red-baseline.json

vfkb broadcast was never exercised by the L4 (RFC-033 §6 v2-variant scope drop) — the pressured delivery arm now seeds via the real broadcast CLI with the visitor identity; scenario brains carry an init-shape manifest; delivery re-pinned 3/3

committed RED baseline is a post-hoc N=1 stashed-engine rerun rather than the original 0/3 run — disclosed in the brain entry; the reviewer independently reproduced the RED deterministically (surgical revert: 4/8 pin tests fail, sentinel absent from the render), so falsifiability stands on its own evidence
gitPosture misreported an unborn-HEAD repo as 'not a git repository' — now distinguishes 'git repository on an unborn branch (no commits yet)'
schema-mismatch refusal message hid the manifest value's type (string '1' vs number 1) — now shows the raw JSON value
